ARBITRATOR JURISDICTION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar Apr-13-2023 Off Calendar

ORDER TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar May-27-2022 Set To Order To Arbtitration Calendar

ASSIGN TO ARBITRATION CALENDAR LIST
Off Calendar May-16-2022 Select Panel Of Arbitrators

Notice Of And Application For Temporary Restraining Order; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Apr-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT 3RE5 LLC, ROULLAND ESTATES LLC, STEPHANE ROULLAND, IVAN KRAUSE Notice Of And Application For Temporary Restraining Order
is DENIED. Defendant should seek a TRO, complying with CCP 527.6(x) and in the proper department. Order submitted for review. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)

Motion For Reclassification Of Action; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Mar-09-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF HARRY BOWER'S MOTION FOR RECLASSIFICATION OF ACTION is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Plaintiff seeks damages in excess of $25,000. The case is classified as an unlimited jurisdiction civil case.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-27-2022 Assigned To Arbitration On May-16-22

Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-01-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Injunction is GRANTED. Preliminary Injunction shall issue on the same terms as the Temporary Restraining Order. If any further issues with utilities/locks shall arise, the landlord shall within 24 hours either fix the issue or appear ex-parte to address reasonable time and accommodations to address the issue. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Injunction
Off Calendar Nov-03-2021 Continued To Nov-18-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Shbly Nacino, 415.757.4526 of Legal Assistances to the Elderly for Plaintiff Harry Bower.

The Court rules as follows: Hearing On Order To Show Cause Re: Injunction is continued to December 1, 2021 for Plaintiff to complete service. TRO shall be re-issued to expire on December 1, 2021. Plaintiff to prepare proposed order and submit it electronically no later than 9:30 a.m. on November 3, 2021. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
